mapper.sql: pg.id, pg.group_code, pg.group_name, pg.description, pg.status, pg.org_id, pg.parent_id, pg.category_id, pg.sort_order, pg.create_by, pg.create_time, pg.update_by, pg.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , org.org_name AS org_name, parent.group_name AS parent_name, u.user_name AS create_by_name, u2.user_name AS update_by_name, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM permission_group_authorized_objects pga WHERE pga.permission_group_id = pg.id) AS authorized_object_count FROM permission_groups pg LEFT JOIN po_organization org ON pg.org_id = org.org_id LEFT JOIN permission_groups parent ON pg.parent_id = parent.id LEFT JOIN po_users u ON pg.create_by = u.user_id LEFT JOIN po_users u2 ON pg.update_by = u2.user_id WHERE pg.id = #{id}

SELECT pg.id AS group_id, pg.group_code AS group_code, pg.group_name AS group_name, pg.description AS comments, pg.create_time AS create_date, pg.create_by AS user_id, COALESCE(c.id, -1) AS catalog_id, COALESCE(c.category_name, 'Measurement') AS catalog_name, CASE WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('-1.', CAST(c.id AS CHAR)) ELSE '-1' END AS catalog_path, CASE WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL THEN 19 ELSE 1 END AS obj_type, COALESCE(c.parent_id, -1) AS parent_catalog_id, COALESCE(c.sort_order, 1) AS sort_id, CASE WHEN c.id IS NULL THEN 'A' WHEN c.status = 'active' THEN 'A' ELSE 'I' END AS state, COALESCE(c.create_by, 1) AS catalog_user_id, COALESCE(c.description, '') AS catalog_comments, CASE WHEN c.id IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS is_system FROM permission_groups pg LEFT JOIN permission_group_categories c ON pg.category_id = c.id
pg.status = 'active'
AND pg.group_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{groupName}, '%')
AND pg.create_by = #{userId}
ORDER BY pg.create_time DESC
